text:
The Compliance Gap No One Is Closing
Multi-Jurisdictional Complexity
Growing Data Volumes
Sophisticated Fraud Patterns
Rule-based and NLP-augmented systems operating at the document level are structurally incapable of detecting these cross-document anomalies.
